response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the song 'ヒビカセ' from on-screen text. 2. Identified the performers as Tokino Sora and Hoshimachi Suisei. 3. Used search to identify original artist 'Giga' and confirmed lyrics. 4. Split video into performance (00:00-03:19) and conversation (03:19-end).
response.global_summary: A video featuring a 3D animated performance of the song 'ヒビカセ' (Hibikase) by the VTubers Tokino Sora and Hoshimachi Suisei, followed by a post-performance conversation.

A sound gives its warning in the middle of the night

I'm fascinated by the overlapping waveforms
